'''Hakma Kinto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] enforcer who worked for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was also [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] for hijacking a cash transport on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].

==Behind the scenes==
Hakma Kinto's bounty was worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
